channel.title: Tezos Systems Governance
channel.description: Live Tezos governance periods, vote outcomes, quorum, and proposal-watch events from tezos.systems.

item.title: Ushuaia Promotion vote is active
item.description: Ushuaia is in Promotion active on Tezos. Ends 2026-06-15T20:55:16Z. Participation 60.72%, yay 100.00%, quorum 49.18%.
